LAW AND MOTION 302, HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF ORION FIRST FINANCIAL, LLC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, ALTERNATIVELY, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION OF ISSUES. MATTER CONTESTED, ARGUMENT IS HELD, AND THE TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT ON ITS SOLE CLAIM FOR BREACH OF GUARANTY IS GRANTED. THE MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AS TO THE AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES IS OFF CALENDAR AS MOOT. PLAINTIFF SHALL PREPARE A FORM OF JUDGMENT FOR $133,270.45. FEES AND COSTS TO BE RESOLVED BY COSTS MEMO/MOTION. MR. SCOTT IS TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER THAT REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING AND A SEPARATE PROPOSED FORM OF JUDGMENT. CRC 3.1312 COMPLIANCE IS REQUIRED. (SEE WORD MINUTES) JUDGE: ROCHELLE C. EAST. CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA. NOT REPORTED. BAILIFF: SR. DEPUTY MALONE. (302/RCE)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-01-2024 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-18-2024 Set For Trial On Dec-09-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Motion For Attorneys Fees To Be Included In Judgment
Against Defendant Scott A. Mcmanus
Off Calendar Oct-16-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF ORION FIRST FINANCIAL, L.L.C.'s Motion For Attorneys Fees To Be Included In Judgment Against Defendant Scott A. Mcmanus.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed motion for attorney fees to be included in judgment is granted.

Order signed. Proposed Judgment forwarded to the reviewing clerk.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, Alternatively, Summary Adjudication Of Issues
Off Calendar Aug-09-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom:
Mark M. Scott, Esq. of Buchalter, Tel. 949.760.1121, for Plaintiff Orion First Financial, LLC;
Steven Swartz, Esq. of Stimmel Stimmel & Roeser, Tel. 415.392.2018 , for Defendant Scott A. McManus.

Hearing re: PLAINTIFF ORION FIRST FINANCIAL, LLC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, ALTERNATIVELY, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION OF ISSUES.

The matter is contested. Argument is held. At the conclusion of argument, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

Plaintiff's motion for summary judgment on its sole claim for breach of guaranty is granted.

The motion for summary adjudication as to the affirmative defenses is off calendar as moot.

Plaintiff shall prepare a form of judgment for $133,270.45. Fees and costs to be resolved by costs memo/motion.

Mr. Scott is to prepare and submit a proposed form of order that repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and a separate proposed form of judgment. CRC 3.1312 compliance is required.

(See Word minutes for the Court's complete ruling.)

Judge: Rochelle C. East. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Not Reported. Bailiff: Sr. Deputy Malone. (302/RCE)
